name: Nutty Brownie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Line a 12 x 9 inch deep, round pizza pan with foil.
3. Melt chocolate and butter together in the top of a double boiler over medium heat until smooth. Stir in sugar until dissolved. Whisk in eggs and almond extract. Blend well. Stir in flour. Mix until well combined.
4. Spread batter evenly over prepared pizza pan.
5. Bake for 30 minutes, or until toothpick inserted comes out with dry, fudgey crumbs attached.
6. For topping: In a small bowl, mix together softened cream cheese, sugar, egg, and vanilla extract until smooth. Pour mixture over the brownie crust.
7. Return to oven and bake another 10 minutes, or until toppings are set and toothpick inserted comes out with dry, fudgey creams attached. Do not overbake.
8. Cool in pan for a few minutes. Lift brownie pizza out of the pan using the edges of foil. Peel off foil and place on serving plate.
9. Sprinkle chopped pecans evenly over the top.
10. Arrange banana slices and raspberries in concentric circles around the crust. Drizzle with melted chocolate.
11. Cut into wedges just like a pizza using a pizza cutter.
